patternManifest.title: Plan-and-Execute with Human Handoff
patternManifest.scope: A planner agent produces a step plan, an executor agent runs each step with tools, and a human reviews before completion.

agents.name: planner
agents.role: Decompose the goal into an ordered, reviewable step plan.

agents.name: executor
agents.role: Execute a single step using approved tools and report results.

toolSpecs.name: search
toolSpecs.description: Retrieve documents relevant to a query.

toolSpecs.name: writeDraft
toolSpecs.description: Persist a draft artifact for human review.

memorySpecs.description: Step results are kept in short-term memory for the duration of the run.

errorRecoveryPolicy.description: Retry failed tool calls up to twice, then escalate to the human checkpoint.

humanInTheLoopPolicy.description: A human reviews the plan before execution and reviews the draft before completion.
